block_04: Your personal information is very important to us and
block_06: takes data protection very seriously. It is our goal to deliver the best services to our traders.
block_07: You are receiving this email because 7 years ago you requested for your account ID:
block_09: and all of the data associated with it to be deleted. Having reviewed our system for your personal data we note that all data held was retained pursuant to our retention period under the following laws and regulations to which we are bound:
block_10: Markets in Financial Instruments Directive II (MIFID II) as amended from time to time,
block_11: The Prevention and Suppression of Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Law of 2007, No. 188(I)/2007, as amended from time to time, and
block_12: The applicable regulations and circulars issued by the Company’s Regulator, the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission.
block_13: Pursuant to the above, we would like to inform you that the data has reached its retention period and in 30 days we are going to erase this data permanently from our systems.
